title: JLPT classifications
description: Community-standard JLPT (Japanese Language Proficiency Test) level classifications for vocabulary, kanji, and grammar points. Derived from Jonathan Waller's JLPT Resources at tanos.co.uk under CC-BY. JLPT stopped publishing official vocabulary lists in 2010; these classifications are community-reverse-engineered consensus and should not be treated as JLPT-official.

metadata.description: Build metadata: source provenance, license, generation date, counts, field documentation, and attribution.

classifications.description: Array of JLPT level classification entries.

disclaimer.description: Explicit statement that these classifications are community-reverse-engineered and not JLPT-official.

counts_by_kind_and_level.description: Breakdown of entry counts by kind and level (e.g., 'vocab_N5': 732).

text.description: The word, kanji, or grammar pattern.

reading.description: For vocabulary, the kana reading for disambiguation.

meaning_en.description: Short English meaning or gloss for convenience. Authoritative meanings live in words.json or kanji.json.

source_retrieved.description: Date this entry was retrieved from Waller's site.

jmdict_seq.description: JMdict entry sequence ID for vocab entries. Used as join key with words.json.

grammar_id.description: Grammar point ID for grammar entries. Used as join key with grammar.json.
